## **[ Familiar ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

Distance=1 kilometer 

Area=1 specific animal 

Duration=Permanent 

Effect=You can turn a small animal into your familiar 

Type=Target score, Non-removable Expansion=Final score Resist=None 

This spell has the effect of allowing a sorcerer to summon and control an animal to become their familiar. The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. For example, frogs or crows. Cats and owls are also famous familiars, and these animals will appear in response to the caster's summons and serve the caster. A sorcerer can have only one familiar. If a sorcerer who already has a familiar tries to summon a second one, it’ll show no effect whatsoever. 

This spell must always be performed as a ritual. The caster requires 3 full days of preparation, followed by 12 hours of spell chanting. Please refer to Table 5-2: Familiars to see what kind of animal will appear as a familiar in response to a summon. 

The summoned familiar and the sorcerer are always in mental contact, so they can communicate in a way similar to telepathy and can also share sensory organs. The caster can use their familiar's sensory organs to see and hear, and vice versa. Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. Abilities of each familiar are listed on the table, but you can find out more details by referring to an animal encyclopedia. 

The caster can also borrow mental points from their familiar to cast spells. In this case, the mental power that would've been consumed by the caster will instead be reduced from the familiar's mental points. Of course, you cannot make a substitution that would cause mental points to become negative, and a familiar whose mental points reach 0 will lose consciousness. 

**Table 5-2: Familiars** 

|Animal Name|Life Points|Mental Points|Abilities|
|---|---|---|---|
|Frog|2|2|Can see things over a wide range|
|Dove|3|3|Can fy|
|Crow|3|4|Can fy|
|Owl|4|4|Sees well in the dark. Can fy|
|Black cat|5|5|Sees well in the dark|



If the familiar loses life points or mental points due to an attack from another, etc., the caster will suffer the same pain that the familiar felt, so they will lose the same amount of points in life force and mental power (this damage cannot be reduced by adventurer level). However, the number of points lost cannot go beyond the familiar's maximum life points or mental points. Even if the familiar receives damage that would cause a negative result, the caster will not lose any extra points. 

in an increase or decrease in your ability bonus by 1 point. If you use it on a youma, etc. which is not represented by ability scores, all you have to do is increase or decrease its attack points (dexterity), evasion points (agility), or strike points (strength) by 1 point. Also, in the case of agility, action order will also increase (decrease) by 6. 

The target is free to attempt to resist this spell or not. If it's used for a decreasing effect, they'll probably want to resist it. Targets who successfully resist will not receive any effect. _Physical Enchant_ cannot expand its effect (that is, increase or decrease ability scores by 12 points, 18 points, etc.). 

When a familiar is involved in magic, etc. the caster can use their adventurer level as the baseline score for the resistance roll. When a familiar takes damage, the caster can also use their adventurer level to reduce the damage. If a caster and their familiar are separated by more than 1 kilometer, contact between them will be temporarily interrupted. Until they're both within 1 kilometer of each other again, they cannot share senses, nor can the caster borrow mental points from their familiar. 

_Physical Enchant_ is subdivided into six spells by their effects. They are called Sharpness, Dullness, Quickness, Slowness, Strength, and Weakness, respectively. 

## **Sharpness** 

Increases the target's dexterity by 6. Increases attack power (points) and the baseline score of dexterity-related abilities by 1 point. 

## **[ Physical Enchant ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=12 

Distance=10 meters 

## **Dullness** 

Area=One 

Decreases the target's dexterity by 6. Decreases attack power (points) and the baseline score of dexterity-related abilities by 1 point. 

Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=You can increase the target's dexterity, agility, or strength by 6 

Type=Target score, physical ability Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets 

## **Quickness** 

Resist=Negated effect 

Increases the target's agility by 6. Affects evasion speed (points) and action order. 

There are six variations of this spell, each of which increase or decrease a target's dexterity, agility, or strength by 6. However, even if you reduce them, they can never become 0. If the ability score was originally 6 or less, it'll instead become 1. In most cases, this will result 

Also increases the baseline score of related abilities. 

72

## **Slowness** 

Reduces the target's agility by 6. Affects evasion speed (points) and action order. 

Also decreases the baseline score of related abilities. 

## **Strength** 

Increases the target's strength by 6. Affects bonus damage (strike points). Also allows you to use weapons that you cannot use with your normal strength. 

## **Weakness** 

Reduces the target's strength by 6. Affects bonus damage (strike points). If, due to this spell being cast, the required strength of your weapon or armor exceeds your own strength, you will be disabled. However, if you're using the optional rules under _16.8: Weapons and Armor That Are Too Heavy_ (see p. 268), you can still act, but you’ll receive a penalty to attack power, evasion speed, etc. 

## **[ Bone Servant ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

Distance=Touch 

Area=1 bone 

## Duration=Permanent 

Effect=Create a human-sized bone golem and make it obey your commands Type=Non-removable, lost Expansion=Duration, targets Resist=None 

This spell creates a puppet golem called a bone servant from the bones of a living creature. The bones used for this spell can be human or animal, but they must be of a certain size and consistency, such as ribs or femurs, as very small bones (such as teeth) or fragments are of no use. 

A bone servant appears in the form of a skeleton. The form it takes depends on the bones used in the spell. If you use human bones, it'll take the form of a human skeleton, such as a skeleton (see p. 215) or a skeleton warrior (see p. 223), or if you use animal bones, it'll take the form of an animal skeleton. 

See p. 223 for bone servant details when using human bones. If bones of other animals are used, the game master is responsible for creating the details. 

## **[ Lightning ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

## Distance=Caster 

Area=A space 1 meter high and wide and 20 meters long 

Duration=Instant 

Effect=Emits strike power 20 lightning Type=Damage (Electric-type) Expansion=Final score, area length (see description), damage certainty Resist=Reduced effect 

This spell releases a powerful electric shock that can reach up to 20 meters from the caster, dealing strike power 20 damage to targets within that distance. If there is a complete obstruction such as a wall, titan, etc. the electric shock will be blocked (it doesn't reflect back), but if there is an object as large as a human, it cannot block the electric shock, and it can even catch targets behind the blocker. Take the _cross-section_ of the lightning as a 1 meter by 1 meter square, and use whether or not this cross-section can be completely blocked as the basis for judgment. 

This spell has a special area of effect expansion. By _doubling_ or _quadrupling_ the mental power consumed , you can increase the length of the lightning to _40_ meters or _80_ meters, respectively. 

## **[ Levitation ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=9 

Distance=Caster Area=Caster 

Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Makes the caster's body float in the air Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

By casting this spell, the caster can levitate up to 10 meters above the ground. During this time, you're completely free to adjust the height. You can use other spells while floating, and perform attacks and evasion as usual. However, you cannot take actions that seem impossible depending on the situation (for example, 

it would be impossible for a caster 10 meters above the ground to engage in melee combat with a monster on the ground). If someone casts _Dispel Magic_ , etc. on you and the spell is removed, you will fall. If you do fall, apply the rules for falling damage (see p. 122). 

## **4th Level Ancient Magic List** 

## **[ Counter Sense ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=12 

Distance=Caster 

Area=Caster 

Duration=Until detected 

Effect=You can negate the power of detection spells and items, and know the type (effect) of spell or item, the one who cast it, their whereabouts, etc. 

Type=Detection Expansion=- 

Resist=None 

If you cast this spell, you can know if you or something you're wearing is being detected by a magical item or spell. At the same time, it will also reveal the type (effect) of spell or item used on you, as well as the clear identity of the person who used it (not just knowing their name, but what they look like). After that the effect of the _Counter Sense_ spell vanishes (although you can recast it, of course). 

This spell targets spells of the _detection_ type, and items such as _crystal orb of clairvoyance_ that have the same effect. 

Also, the effects of detection items and spells, no matter how long their duration, will vanish after _1 round_ due to _Counter Sense_ activating. In other words, for 1 round, the opponent's detection spell or item will work normally, and information of what happened during that time will be told to the opponent. They'll also discover that you have used the spell _Counter Sense_ . 

You cannot cast this spell multiple times in advance, to be able to trace back multiple times without having to recast it. 

## **[ Conceal Self ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=16 Distance=Caster 

73

## Area=Caster 

## Duration=Until focus ends 

Effect=Makes the caster invisible to others Type=Focus, illusion Expansion=Final score Resist=Negated effect 

This spell has the effect of completely concealing the caster’s presence from others. In other words, not only will they become invisible, you will no longer be able to hear sounds made by the caster, and of course you won't be able to smell them. However, you can feel their presence if you touch them. This spell cannot be cast on others. The duration lasts as long as your focus continues. If you take any action that breaks your focus, the effect of this spell vanishes immediately. 

## **[ Shape Change ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 Distance=Caster Area=Caster 

Duration=Depends on caster's intention Effect=Change the caster’s appearance Type=Target score Expansion=Final score Resist=None 

This is a spell that allows the caster to change their form into another living creature at will. However, the creatures they can change into are limited to about _10 times_ or _1/10th_ of the caster's weight. You can think of the maximum as a 6- meter tall titan and the minimum as a medium-sized cat. The caster can cancel the spell's effect at any time, but once it's canceled, you cannot take on that form again unless you cast the spell again. You can only change into humans, fae, youma, titans, and animals, and only those the caster knows in detail (you must succeed on a roll such as the sage skill's _monster check_ ). You can never change into something whose origins are not clearly known, such as magical beasts, mythical beasts, etc. 

Only the caster's body will change shape, the clothes and accessories they're wearing do not change. They will fall off or break in the process of changing. Also, after changing form, the caster's physical abilities will become the same as the 

creature they changed into. You will also gain special abilities such as flying. The caster will not lose their sense of self, and can cancel the spell at will. 

## **[ Sense Aura ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=12 

Distance=Caster 

Area=Within the caster's view Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=The caster can distinguish the kind of powers present in their surroundings Type=Detection Expansion=Duration Resist=None 

By casting this spell, the caster can recognize the following powers at work in their surroundings: 

Spirit Power: This gives the caster the same effect that a shaman has with its basic ability. 

Magic Power: This allows you to know the presence of objects and spaces where ancient or holy magic is at work. 

## **[ Tongue ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=12 

Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=1 hour 

Effect=Become able to speak unknown languages Type=- 

Expansion=Duration, effect (see description) Resist=None 

By casting this spell, the caster will be able to converse in a language previously unknown to them. This spell only allows you to speak _one_ language each time you cast it, so in order to be able to speak _two_ or _three_ unknown languages at the same time, you must _expand_ the effect of the spell. Also, this spell only allows you to use languages used by intelligent creatures listed on Table 12-1: Languages (see p. 159), so that means you will not be able to speak to animals, etc. 

## **[ Paralyze ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 Distance=10 Meters Area=One Duration=Until focus ends Effect=Completely seals the target's movement Type=Focus, target score 

## Expansion=Final score, distance Resist=Negated effect 

This is a spell that completely seals your opponent's movements. Those who fail to resist will lose their freedom and immediately become rigid on the spot. A target caught by this magic in an unstable state will likely fall down. If it were a bird, it would fall out of the sky. 

To maintain this spell, the caster must keep focus. Someone who's had this spell cast on them may only attempt to resist the first time the spell is cast. 

## **[ Fireball ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 Distance=20 Meters Area=A space with a 3 meter radius 

Duration=Instant 

Effect=Causes an explosion centered on a point in space, dealing strike power 20 damage 

Type=Damage (Fire-type) Expansion=Final score, distance, area, damage certainty Resist=Reduced effect 

This is a spell of destruction that is forbidden by wise sorcerers. It creates an explosion centered on a point in space within a 3 meter radius, dealing fire and shock damage to everything within. Its strike power is 20 (10 with no criticals on a successful resist). 

## **[ Location ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=16 

Distance=Caster Area=Infinite 

Duration=1 Day 

Effect=Know the direction in which a target item is located 

Type=Detection 

Expansion=Duration 

Resist=None 

This is a spell that specifies a specific object and the direction in which it currently exists. 

No matter how far away the object is from the caster, the spell will still take effect. Also, the closer you get, the more you can feel its presence, so you can get a rough estimate of the distance. The caster must know the actual object being targeted by the spell well enough to specify it. Therefore, unspecified objects 

74

such as _a sword_ or _a goblin_ cannot be detected (it's not possible if it's _my favorite sword_ ). 

## **5th Level Ancient Magic List** 

## **[ Apport ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=25 Distance=Infinite Area=Caster's property Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Teleports the caster's possessions into the palm of their hand 

Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None 

This is a spell that allows the caster to teleport their possessions into the palm of their hand. However, even though it's their possession, the caster must have a complete memory of it, and moreover must be able to identify specifically where it's kept. Also, the size of the target is limited to something you can hold in your hand (for example, you can summon a sword, but not armor). If the duration expires or if the spell is canceled, the target immediately returns to its original location. 

## **[ Illusion ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 Distance=30 meters 

Area=A space with a 5 meter radius 

Duration=Permanent, until focus ends Effect=Can create illusions using images and sounds 

Type=(Focus), illusion 

Expansion=Final score, distance, target volume Resist=Negated effect 

This spell creates illusions that affect the senses of hearing and vision. The illusion can be anything within its area of effect, but it cannot cause any realistic effects. For example, you can create a wall of fire via illusion, but you won't feel any heat even if you approach it, and you won't burn to death even if you jump into it. However, the illusions created by this spell are so realistic that they cannot be discovered just by looking at them normally. The spell's effect continues even if you touch it. If an illusion of a 

stone wall is in a passage, you can't see beyond it, but you're completely free to pass through it (if you try). However, this result will not destroy the illusion of the stone wall. As long as the caster maintains focus, they can freely change the illusion, but if they lose focus, only static or simple repeating illusions can remain. The caster can freely cancel the spell's effect, but a _Dispel Magic_ spell is required if someone else attempts to remove it. 

## **[ Suppress Elemental ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 

Distance=10 meters 

Area=A space with a 5 meter radius Duration=18 rounds 

Effect=Negate any one of the four major spirit 

powers Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, area 

Resist=None 

This spell has the effect of negating any one of the four major spirit powers of earth, water, fire, or wind. However, only one kind of spirit power can be erased at a time. This spell cannot be expanded to block two or more kinds of spirit power from working at the same time. As a result of this, spirit magic that depends on that spirit power will no longer be usable. Also, if a spell effect is present due to the negated spirit power (either gnome, undine, salamander, or sylph) within the spell's area of effect, it will be negated. If that spirit is present, it will also disappear from existence and return to the spirit world. However, this has no effect on greater spirits (behemoth, kraken, efreet, djinn). 

## **[ Skeleton Warrior ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=20 

Distance=Touch 

Area=Dragon's tooth 

Duration=Permanent 

Effect=Create a skeleton warrior and make it obey your commands Type=Non-removable Expansion=Target score Resist=None 

A skeleton warrior, also known as a dragontooth warrior, is a kind of golem created from a dragon's tooth, and resembles a human skeleton with a sword and shield. This spell is what creates that formidable warrior. 

The caster can give commands to the skeleton warrior in high ancient. Only the caster can give commands. They cannot understand overly complex commands, but they handle simple commands accurately. For example, commands such as _kill anyone who enters this room_ or _kill that man_ are very simple and can be carried out, but a command such as _go to the next village and kidnap the chief's daughter_ cannot be carried out. 

The dragon's tooth, which is the source of the skeleton warrior, is a very valuable item as one of the treasures of the ancient kingdom. You'd have to pay a whopping 5000 silver coins to purchase it. 

See p. 223 for skeleton warrior scores. 

## **[ Sense Lie ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

Distance=Caster 

Area=Area that the caster can hear Duration=1 hour 

Effect=Can discover lies Type=Detection Expansion=Duration Resist=None 

By casting this spell, the caster can discover parts that are untrue, exaggerated, and dramatized in conversations they overhear. During the duration, all words that the caster hears are subject to a true-or-false check. However, while you can discover lies, you cannot know truths. You can only know that if it's a lie, it's a lie, and if it's an exaggeration, it's an exaggeration. 

## **[ Translate ]** 

Base Mental Power Cost=15 

Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=1 Hour Effect=Can read unknown languages Type=- 

Expansion=Duration, effect (see description) Resist=None 

75
